case_title: G4 MEDIA, INC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION VS. SOMA NETWORKS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Brian D. Huban, Esq. appeared for plaintiff G4 Media, Inc. a Delaware corporation.
No appearance by defendant SOMA networks, Inc., a California corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on May 14, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 1, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff G4 Media, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant SOMA Networks, Inc., a California corporation as follows:

Damages - $142,532.62.
Interest - $1,455.50.
Attorney Fees - $12,810.64.
Costs - 590.00.

Total - $157,388.76.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
